title: Fix three dashboard truth defects found in DASHBOARD_TRUTH_REVERIFY_001
objective: Fix exactly three defects in dashboard.html identified by the reverify audit. No other files. No scope expansion.
do_not_touch: dashboard_server.py — all three fixes are UI-only in dashboard.html
Any file not listed in allowed_files

fixes.problem: renderPositionsTab computes todayRealized by summing sliced/visible closed trades in the current display window, producing an arbitrary partial sum instead of total realized P&L. UI shows +$43.62 while true realized is +$405.89.
fixes.fix: Replace the closed-slice reduction with the authoritative value already available in the API response: use /api/state pnl.realized or /api/bankroll net_pnl. If the intent is to show a recent/rolling metric only, relabel the tile clearly (e.g. 'Recent P&L') so it is not confused with lifetime realized P&L.
fixes.constraint: Do not change the data source for any other PnL display area. Only fix the Positions tab tile that is mis-computing this value.

fixes.area: mark_source not displayed on position cards
fixes.problem: buildUnifiedPositionCards receives mark_source on position objects from the backend SSE stream but never renders it in the card UI. The source chip shows trade source (model_bridge) only, not mark source (stream / rest_fallback / poll_fallback). Operator cannot see whether card pricing is live or stale-fallback.
fixes.fix: Add a small mark_source indicator to the card metadata row or stale badge area. When mark_source is 'rest_fallback' or 'poll_fallback', display a visible indicator (e.g. a chip or badge labeled 'REST' or 'POLL'). When mark_source is 'stream', it can be subtle or omitted if space is tight. Do not remove the existing trade-source chip.
fixes.constraint: Do not alter card layout for any field other than adding this indicator. Keep it compact.

fixes.problem: UI reads s.total_closed ?? 0 for the R25 tile sublabel, but /api/state does not expose total_closed — it exposes total_trades and r25.sample_size. Result: sublabel always shows '0 trades'.
fixes.fix: Replace s.total_closed with s.r25?.sample_size for the sample-size sublabel. If the intent is to show total closed trades ever, use s.total_trades instead (confirm which is more meaningful for the operator context).
fixes.constraint: Only change this one field reference. Do not alter the r25 win-rate display or any other r25 field.

deliverables: Exact lines changed for each of the three fixes
Before/after for the Positions tab realized P&L value (confirm it now reads from /api/state or /api/bankroll)
Before/after for mark_source display (confirm it renders rest_fallback/poll_fallback indicator)
Before/after for R25 sublabel (confirm it no longer shows 0 when trades exist)
Confirmation that no other files were touched
Confirmation that existing open-positions panel, bankroll strip, r25 win-rate, and game feed are unaffected
acceptance_criteria: Positions tab Realized P&L tile reads authoritative value from /api/state or /api/bankroll — not a closed-trade slice sum
mark_source chip or badge appears on position cards and shows rest_fallback/poll_fallback distinctly from stream
R25 tile sublabel shows a non-zero sample count when trades exist
No regression to: open-positions count, bankroll strip, r25 win-rate percentage, game feed
verification: Read /api/bankroll and confirm UI Positions tab now shows the same net_pnl value
Read /api/state and confirm r25 sublabel now shows r25.sample_size (or total_trades) rather than 0
Confirm mark_source field is present in SSE payload and rendered on position cards
Confirm no other tiles or panels changed values unexpectedly
rollback: Revert dashboard.html only. No runtime restart required — dashboard.html is served statically from the running server.
restart_note: dashboard.html is served as a static file. Browser refresh is sufficient to pick up changes after the file is saved.
